---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
if (!require(stm)) install.packages("stm")
if (!require(dplyr)) install.packages("dplyr")
if (!require(readr)) install.packages("readr")
if (!require(ggplot2)) install.packages("ggplot2")
if (!require(tidytext)) install.packages("tidytext")
if (!require(corrplot)) install.packages("corrplot")
if (!require(splines)) install.packages("splines")
if (!require(readxl)) install.packages("readxl")
if (!require(tm)) install.packages("tm")
if (!require(openxlsx)) install.packages("openxlsx")

library(stm)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidytext)
library(corrplot)
library(splines)
library(tm)
library(glue)
library(future)
library(furrr)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r setup include=FALSE}
# This command sets the working directory for ALL chunks in this document.
knitr::opts_chunk$set(root.dir = 'D:/skripsi')
```

```{r}
# data <- read_excel("../outputs/no_unk_processed_STM_ALL.xlsx")
data <- read_excel("../price_merge_imputed.xlsx")
```

```{r}
head(data)
```

```{r}
sapply(data[c("segment", "price", "predicted_class", "processed_text_stm")], function(x) sum(is.na(x)))

# Basic summary statistics
cat("Dataset Summary:\n")
cat("Total reviews:", nrow(data), "\n")
cat("Segments:", paste(unique(data$segment), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Types:", paste(unique(data$type), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Year range:", min(data$year, na.rm = TRUE), "-", max(data$year, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

```
```{r}
table(data$segment, data$type)
```

```{r}
data_clean <- data %>%
  filter(!is.na(processed_text_stm) & 
         !is.na(segment) & 
         !is.na(type) & 
         !is.na(year) &
         nchar(processed_text_stm) > 7)  # Remove very short texts

cat("Data after cleaning:\n")
cat("Remaining reviews:", nrow(data_clean), "\n")
```
```{r}
revisit_stopwords <- c(
  # Direct outcome words and their variations
  "recommend", "recommended", "recommends",
  "return", "returned", "returning",
  "revisit", "revisited",
  "back", "come", "comeback",
  "again", "stayagain",
  # Intensifiers that almost always modify an outcome phrase
  "definitely", "highly", "absolutely", "certainly",
  # Conditional or future-intent words
  "would", "next",
  # Names
  "aadc", "aah", "aahhhhh", "aaron", "aayartta", "abdul", "abe", "abel", "abib", "adhistana", "adhisthana", "adidas", "adimulia", "adisucipto", "adisutjipto", "alan", "aldo", "alex", "alexander", "alexandra", "alica",
  "alisha", "alissa", "alvin", "amanda", "ana", "andine", "andre", "andrea", "andrianto", "anton", "antonio", "australia", "bali", "batu", "ben", "bromo", "canggu", "casa", "chris", "daniel", "darwin", "devi",
  "evan", "gaia", "garda", "helena", "indonesia", "ivan", "jakarta", "jasmine", "jatim", "jay", "jeff", "jiva", "jogja", "jogjakarta", "johnny", "kolo", "kuta", "legian", "lenny", "lily", "malang", "malioboro",
  "marinetti", "medan", "novotel", "nusa", "omar", "pak", "pakuwon", "prawirotaman", "ria", "rio", "rudy", "sari", "semarang", "seraph", "solo", "sudirman", "surabaya", "thamrin", "ubud", "yogi", "yogyakarta",
  "agoda", "ibis", "ascott", "eva", "tunjungan", "seminyak", "indrayana", "antonius", "nyeman",
  "great","surely", "stayed","everything","anything","else","really","one","since","always","kedawungville","asked","told","nothing","two","must","sew","tug","except","also","mia","ever","eth","nine","wow","cara","haha","hehe","lucas","sabrina","elm","monica","rialto","uluwatu","ancol","ciputra","yello","hyatt","want","although","whenever","gubeng","harris","indra", "belinda"
) 
corpus <- VCorpus(VectorSource(data_clean$processed_text_stm))
corpus <- tm_map(corpus, removeWords, revisit_stopwords)

# Convert the corpus back to a character vector to put in your data frame
data_clean$processed_text_stm <- sapply(corpus, as.character)

```

```{r}
processed <- textProcessor(
  documents = data_clean$processed_text_stm,
  metadata = data_clean[c("id","segment", "price", "predicted_class")],
  # metadata = data_clean[c("segment", "type")],
  lowercase = FALSE,  
  removestopwords = TRUE,    
  removenumbers = TRUE,
  removepunctuation = FALSE,  
  stem = TRUE,  
  wordLengths = c(3, Inf),  # Keep words with 3+ characters
  language = "en",
)

cat("\nText processing results:\n")
cat("Documents retained:", length(processed$documents), "\n")
cat("Vocabulary size:", length(processed$vocab), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Prepare documents for STM
out <- prepDocuments(
  processed$documents, 
  processed$vocab, 
  processed$meta,
  lower.thresh = 12,  # Remove words that appear in fewer than 5 documents
  upper.thresh = (70000 * 0.95)
  )

cat("\nAfter prepDocuments:\n")
cat("Documents retained:", length(out$documents), "\n")
cat("Vocabulary size:", length(out$vocab), "\n")
cat("Words removed due to frequency:", processed$words.removed, "\n")
cat("Documents removed:", processed$docs.removed, "\n")
```
```{r}
saveRDS(out, "../outputs/WIDPRCoutDocsWithStem.rds")
```

```{r}
out <- readRDS("../outputs/WIDPRCoutDocsWithStem.rds")
```

```{r}
meta <- out$meta
documents <- out$documents
vocab <- out$vocab
meta$segment <- as.factor(meta$segment)
meta$type <- as.factor(meta$type)
meta$year <- as.numeric(as.character(meta$year))
meta$predicted_class <- as.factor(meta$predicted_class) 
head(meta)
```
```{r}
meta <- out$meta
documents <- out$documents
vocab <- out$vocab
meta$segment <- as.factor(meta$segment)
meta$price <- as.numeric(meta$price)
# meta$year <- as.numeric(as.character(meta$year))
meta$predicted_class <- as.factor(meta$predicted_class) 
head(meta)
```


```{r}
library(future)
library(furrr)
library(tidyverse)

num_cores <- availableCores() - 1
plan(multisession, workers = num_cores)
```

```{r}
searchK_parallel <- function(documents, vocab, K, prevalence, data,
                             init.type = "Spectral", seed = 123,
                             max.em.its = 75, verbose = FALSE,
                             workers = availableCores() - 1,
                             resume_file = NULL) {
  
  old_results <- NULL
  if (!is.null(resume_file) && file.exists(resume_file)) {
    message("Found existing results file. Loading progress...")
    old_results <- readRDS(resume_file)
    completed_k <- old_results$results_df$K
  } else {
    completed_k <- c()
  }
  
  new_k_to_run <- setdiff(K, completed_k)
  
  if (length(new_k_to_run) > 0) {
    message(paste("Computing for K =", paste(new_k_to_run, collapse = ", ")))
    
    # Make held-out data (same for all K)
    heldout <- make.heldout(documents, vocab)
    
    plan(multisession, workers = workers)
    
    new_results_list <- future_map(new_k_to_run, function(k) {
      model <- stm(
        documents = heldout$documents,
        vocab = vocab,
        K = k,
        prevalence = prevalence,
        data = data,
        init.type = init.type,
        seed = seed,
        max.em.its = max.em.its,
        verbose = verbose
      )
      
      heldout_val <- eval.heldout(model, heldout$missing)$expected.heldout
      semcoh_val  <- mean(semanticCoherence(model, documents))
      exclusivity_val <- mean(exclusivity(model))
      
      list(
        model = model,
        heldout = heldout_val,
        semcoh = semcoh_val,
        exclusivity = exclusivity_val
      )
    }, .options = furrr_options(seed = TRUE))
    
    new_results_df <- tibble(
      K = new_k_to_run,
      results = new_results_list,
      heldout = map_dbl(new_results_list, "heldout"),
      semcoh = map_dbl(new_results_list, "semcoh"),
      exclusivity = map_dbl(new_results_list, "exclusivity")
    )
    
    if (!is.null(old_results)) {
      combined_df <- bind_rows(old_results$results_df, new_results_df) %>% arrange(K)
      combined_list <- c(old_results$results, new_results_list)
    } else {
      combined_df <- new_results_df
      combined_list <- new_results_list
    }
    
  } else {
    message("All K values in the specified range are already complete.")
    combined_df <- old_results$results_df
    combined_list <- old_results$results
  }

  out <- list(
    results = combined_list,
    results_df = combined_df,
    K = combined_df$K
  )
  
  if (!is.null(resume_file)) {
    saveRDS(out, file = resume_file)
    message(paste("Updated results saved to", resume_file))
  }
  
  class(out) <- c("searchK_parallel", "list")
  return(out)
}


# searchK plot
plot.searchK_parallel <- function(x, ...) {
  df <- x$results_df %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(heldout, semcoh, exclusivity),
                 names_to = "metric", values_to = "value")
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = K, y = value, color = metric)) +
    geom_line(size = 1.2) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(
      title = "Parallel STM Model Diagnostics by K",
      x = "Number of Topics (K)",
      y = "Metric Value"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
}
```

```{r}
topic_range <- seq(14, 28, 2)

search_results <- searchK_parallel(
  documents = documents,
  vocab = vocab,
  K = topic_range,
  prevalence = ~ segment + type + predicted_class,
  data = meta,
  seed = 123,
  max.em.its = 65,
  resume_file = "../outputs/NALL_stm_searchk_results.rds"
)

plot(search_results)
```

```{r}
saveRDS(search_results, file = "../outputs/all_stm_searchk_results.rds")
```

```{r}
search_results3 <- readRDS("../outputs/ONLYEN_stm_searchk_results.rds")
```

```{r}
# if (!require(ggrepel)) install.packages("ggrepel")
library(ggrepel)
p <- search_results$results_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = semcoh, y = exclusivity)) +
  geom_point(shape = 18, size = 3, color = "darkblue") +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = K), size = 5, point.padding = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Semantic Coherence vs. Exclusivity",
    x = "Semantic Coherence",
    y = "Exclusivity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-140, -20), ylim = c(9.5, 10))

ggsave("../outputs/model_diagnostics.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
fit_final_models_parallel <- function(K_values, output_dir, documents, vocab, prevalence, data, seed, max_its = 100, init_type = "Spectral", workers = availableCores() - 1) {
  
  dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  plan(multisession, workers = workers)
  
  message(paste("Starting to fit final models for K =", paste(K_values, collapse = ", ")))
  
  saved_model_paths <- future_map_chr(K_values, function(k) {
    
    file_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("PWLALL2WS_stm_model_K", k, ".rds"))
    
    if (file.exists(file_path)) {
      message(paste("Model for K =", k, "already exists. Skipping."))
      return(file_path) # Return the existing path and move to the next K
    }
    
    message(paste("Fitting model for K =", k, "..."))
    
    model <- stm(
      documents = documents,
      vocab = vocab,
      K = k,
      prevalence = prevalence, 
      data = data,
      seed = seed,
      max.em.its = max_its, 
      init.type = init_type,
    )
    
    saveRDS(model, file = file_path)
    
    message(paste("Model for K =", k, "saved to:", file_path))
    
    return(file_path)
    
  }, .options = furrr_options(seed = TRUE))
  
  tibble(
    K = K_values,
    model_path = saved_model_paths
  )
}
```

```{r}
final_k_values <- c(20)

final_model_dir <- "../outputs/final_models/"

saved_models_info <- fit_final_models_parallel(
  K_values = final_k_values,
  output_dir = final_model_dir,
  documents = documents,
  vocab = vocab,
  prevalence = ~ segment + type, 
  data = meta,
  seed = 42,
  max_its = 180, 
  init_type = "Spectral" 
)

print(saved_models_info)
```

```{r}
K_opt = 20
stm_model <- readRDS(glue("../outputs/final_models/stm_model_K{K_opt}.rds"))

topic_props <- colMeans(stm_model$theta)
names(topic_props) <- paste("Topic", 1:K_opt)
topic_props_df <- data.frame(
  Topic = names(topic_props),
  Proportion = topic_props
) %>%
  arrange(desc(Proportion))

print("Topic Proportions (Overall):")
print(topic_props_df)
```

```{r message=TRUE, warning=TRUE}
library(openxlsx)

final_k_values <- c(20)

N_TOP_WORDS <- 30

model_input_dir <- "../outputs/final_models/"
base_output_dir <- "../outputs/stm_analysis"

dir.create(base_output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

for (K_opt in final_k_values) {
  message(glue("\nProcessing model with K = {K_opt}..."))
  
  model_output_dir <- file.path(base_output_dir, glue("PWLALL2WS_K_{K_opt}"))
  dir.create(model_output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  model_path <- file.path(model_input_dir, glue("PWLALL2WS_stm_model_K{K_opt}.rds"))
  
  if (!file.exists(model_path)) {
    warning(glue("Model file not found for K={K_opt} at path: {model_path}. Skipping."))
    next 
  }
  
  stm_model <- readRDS(model_path)
  
  message("  -> Analyzing overall topic proportions...")
  
  topic_props <- colMeans(stm_model$theta)
  
  topic_props_df <- tibble(
    Topic = paste("Topic", 1:K_opt),
    Proportion = topic_props
  ) %>%
    arrange(desc(Proportion))
  
  write.xlsx(topic_props_df, file = file.path(model_output_dir, "topic_proportions.xlsx"))
  
  proportions_plot <- ggplot(topic_props_df, aes(x = reorder(Topic, Proportion), y = Proportion)) +
    geom_col(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(
      title = glue("Overall Topic Proportions (K={K_opt})"),
      x = "Topic",
      y = "Proportion"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(model_output_dir, "topic_proportions_plot.png"),
    plot = proportions_plot,
    width = 8,
    height = 10,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  message("  -> Extracting and saving top words for each topic...")
  
  top_words <- labelTopics(stm_model, n = N_TOP_WORDS)
  top_words_df <- map_df(1:K_opt, function(topic_num) {
    
    # Combine the words from all four metrics for the current topic
    words_data <- rbind(
      top_words$frex[topic_num, ],
    #  top_words$prob[topic_num, ],
    #  top_words$lift[topic_num, ],
      top_words$score[topic_num, ]
    )
    
    words_df <- as.data.frame(words_data)
    colnames(words_df) <- paste0("Word_", 1:N_TOP_WORDS)
    
    bind_cols(
      tibble(
        Topic = topic_num,
      #  Metric = c("FREX", "Probability", "Lift", "Score")
        Metric = c("FREX", "Score")
      ),
      words_df
    )
  })
  
  write.xlsx(
    top_words_df, 
    file = file.path(model_output_dir, glue("{K_opt}_top_words_by_topic_single_sheet.xlsx"))
  )
  
  message("  -> Saving model summary statistics...")
  
  summary_text <- c(
    glue("STM Model Summary for K = {K_opt}"),
    "---------------------------------",
    glue("Number of topics: {K_opt}"),
    glue("Number of documents: {stm_model$settings$dim$N}"),
    glue("Vocabulary size: {stm_model$settings$dim$V}")
  )
  
  writeLines(summary_text, con = file.path(model_output_dir, "model_summary.txt"))
  
  message(glue("Successfully saved all results for K = {K_opt} to '{model_output_dir}'"))
}

message("\nAll models have been processed successfully! ✅")

```

```{r}
library(stm)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(glue)

out <- readRDS("../outputs/WIDoutDocsWithStem.rds")

K_opt <- 20
model_filename <- glue("../outputs/final_models/WLALL2WS_stm_model_K{K_opt}.rds")

if (!file.exists(model_filename)) {
  stop(glue("File model tidak ditemukan: {model_filename}. 
            Periksa kembali nama file di folder '../outputs/final_models/'."))
}

stm_model <- readRDS(model_filename)

cat(glue("Model K={K_opt} berhasil dimuat.\n"))

# --- 4. Ekstrak matriks proporsi topik (theta) ---
# 'stm_model$theta' adalah matriks di mana:
# - Setiap baris adalah satu dokumen (ulasan).
# - Setiap kolom adalah satu topik (K).
# - Nilai di sel [i, j] adalah proporsi topik j pada dokumen i.
topic_proportions_matrix <- stm_model$theta

# --- 5. Ubah matriks menjadi dataframe yang lebih rapi ---
# Kita beri nama kolom 'Topic1', 'Topic2', dst.
topic_features_df <- as.data.frame(topic_proportions_matrix) %>%
  setNames(paste0("Topic", 1:K_opt))

training_data <- bind_cols(out$meta, topic_features_df)
```

```{r}
library(readr)
output_csv_path <- glue("../outputs/WIDWLALL2WS_GBT_td_K{K_opt}.csv")
write_csv(training_data, output_csv_path)
```
